title: ocimum selloi var. carnosum
intro: Ocimum selloi var. carnosum, also known as Mexican basil, is a variety of the Ocimum selloi plant, a type of herb native to Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ocimum selloi var. carnosum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
